Hi!

Thanks for submitted patches. I'm a bit busy currently,
so I won't probably be able to dedicate fully for working
on ocaml update for one or two weeks.

In the meantime, can you, please, look at the some issued
with new ocaml. It seems that some ports are affected by upgrade
(e.g. advi doesn't build).

Thanks!
- -- 
Stanislav Sedov
ST4096-RIPE
